Rules.InvariantScript:
"Type: " &
If(
    IsBlank(varSelectedIncident.'Incident Type') || IsBlank(varSelectedIncident.'Incident Type'.Value),
    "Unknown",
    varSelectedIncident.'Incident Type'.Value
)

If(
    Coalesce(varSelectedIncident.'Support Requested', false),
    sepDispatchSupportLine.Y + 88,
    sepDispatchStatusLine.Y + 10
)

With(
    { locText: Coalesce(Text(varSelectedIncident.Location), "") },
    If(
        IsBlank(locText),
        "Location: Location not available",
        IfError(
            With(
                { parts: Split(locText, ",") },
                "Location: " &
                Text(Value(Trim(First(parts).Value)), "[$-en-US]0.000000") & ", " &
                Text(Value(Trim(Last(parts).Value)), "[$-en-US]0.000000")
            ),
            "Location: " & locText
        )
    )
)

Text(
    Coalesce(varSelectedIncident.'Last Updated', varSelectedIncident.'Created Time'),
    "[$-en-US]h:mm AM/PM"
)

"ETA: " &
If(
    Coalesce(varSelectedIncident.'Support Requested', false),
    "8",
    Switch(
        varSelectedIncident.'Incident Type'.Value,
        "Structure Fire", "5",
        "Medical Emergency", "6",
        "Vehicle Fire", "7",
        "Animal Rescue", "8",
        "Other Emergency", "9",
        "8"
    )
)
& " minutes"
